data.title: LD Systems and OPEX Corporation Announce Strategic Partnership to Deliver Next-Generation Goods-to-Person Warehouse Automation Solutions
data.description: In a recent statement, LD Systems, a prominent warehouse systems integrator, revealed a new partnership with OPEX® Corporation. This collaboration will see LD Systems incorporating OPEX Infinity® and Perfect Pick® Automated Storage and Retrieval Systems into their portfolio. This move is designed to enhance LD Systems' offerings and provide improved solutions to customers. The announcement was made on May 1, 2026, in Daytona Beach, Florida. This strategic partnership aims to leverage the strengths of both companies in the realm of automated storage and retrieval systems, offering greater efficiency and innovation in warehouse operations.

data.title: Ventricular Assist Device Market: USD 2.81 Bn by 2031 with Bridge-to-Transplant Therapy Segment Holding Over 48.7% Share in 2025, Says Mordor Intelligence
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of May 1, 2026, the ventricular assist devices market size, as reported by Mordor Intelligence, has reached USD 1.88 billion, showing growth from USD 1.73 billion in the previous year. Projections indicate that by 2031, the market is expected to reach USD 2.81 billion, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.44%.

data.title: All Funeral Services' Tending App Receives ICCFA Keeping It Personal Award for Innovative Personalized Product
data.description: On May 1, 2026, in New York, All Funeral Services unveiled their Tending App, which is the pioneering national service designed for headstone restoration and grave upkeep. This innovative platform is acknowledged nationwide for its unique method of delivering personalized memorial care.

data.title: Lupus Foundation of America Rallies Communities to Make Lupus Visible for Lupus Awareness Month
data.description: In May 2026, the Lupus Foundation of America is urging individuals affected by lupus, as well as their support networks, to actively raise awareness for Lupus Awareness Month. The campaign aims to make a significant impact by encouraging people to speak up and amplify their voices to bring attention to lupus, a chronic autoimmune disease. By increasing visibility and sharing personal stories, the foundation hopes to educate and inform others about the challenges faced by the approximately 1.5 million Americans living with lupus.

data.title: Mobile Hydraulic Cranes Market worth $9.23 billion by 2029 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report from MarketsandMarkets™ forecasts significant growth in the mobile hydraulic cranes market in North America. The market is predicted to reach a value of USD 8.06 billion by 2026, with further growth to USD 9.23 billion by 2029, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.6% during the forecast period. Interested individuals can explore the detailed market analysis and trends in a selection of 150 available reports.

data.title: American Water Marks Drinking Water Week with National Focus on Safe, Reliable Water
data.description: In Camden, New Jersey, on May 1, 2026, American Water, listed on the NYSE as AWK, the leading regulated water and wastewater utility firm in the United States, emphasizes Drinking Water Week from May 3 to 9, 2026. The company remains committed to providing secure, pure, dependable, and cost-effective water services.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Kiely Family of Companies/
data.description: Kiely Family of Companies has officially acquired M. O'Herron Company, as mentioned in a news release issued on May 1, 2026. This update comes directly from a company representative who clarified the change in the headline from "Capitalized" to "Acquired". The transaction signifies a significant move in the industry and underscores Kiely Family of Companies' growth strategy. Further details on the acquisition and its impact will be disclosed in the complete announcement.

data.title: Record 182 CCM Originators Named to Scotsman Guide's Top Women List
data.description: In Cleveland on May 1, 2026, CrossCountry Mortgage (CCM) was recognized as the top retail mortgage lender in the country for the third year in a row. They have achieved this title with a noteworthy total of 182 loan officers being named to the prestigious 2026 Scotsman Guide Top Women Originators list. This is a new record for the company, showcasing their commitment to excellence and highlighting the exceptional talent within their workforce.
